name: Bitty Ink Lamia
description:
A lamia ink bitty type! you walk into a rescue center and look around :] type is based on an Easter from fantasy fields bitty center, looks is based on the art though(you can say its a morph :])

This is a WIP so leave any reviews telling me if its funky!! ill do my best to fix it
